_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: SA Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Confidential Term Sheet – Proposed Murabaha Financing and Majority Acquisition of Altahadi Manufacturing LLC by Rimal Industries Company (a Tadawul-listed joint stock company).

Consideration: SAR 180,000,000 for 60% stake; financing: SAR 120,000,000 Shari’ah-compliant Murabaha, profit rate SAIBOR + 210 bps, tenor 5 years, security over target shares and selected receivables.

Public vs non-public: Issuer’s non-binding MoU regarding a prospective industrial acquisition was announced on the Saudi Exchange website on 1448/02/10H (2026-05-17G) and remains public; pricing grid, covenants, and board meeting timing herein are MNPI until disclosure.

Conditions precedent: Board approval; EGM if acquisition triggers shareholder approval threshold; lender IC approval; completion of legal/financial due diligence; no CMA objection; obtaining target’s Commercial Register extract and KYC under PDPL-compliant notices.

Covenants: No dividend distribution by Issuer until leverage <2.5x; Target to enter non-compete; customary representations; no public guidance or earnings comment until Saudi Exchange announcement; no communication with media except through authorized disclosure channels.

Disclosure timing: If Board approval occurs during trading hours, announce on the Saudi Exchange promptly the same day; if after hours, announce before market open on the next trading day; breach may result in CMA enforcement for selective disclosure.
Outside date/termination: Long-stop 120 days from signing; automatic lapse if CMA or Saudi Exchange objects or if required shareholder approval is not obtained; no-break fee absent willful breach.
Proposed Murabaha Financing and Majority Acquisition of Altahadi Manufacturing LLC
